emails.body:
ACQUISITION TODAY — MORNING MEMO
29 September 2026

RAPID ACQUISITION & TEST RANGE MODERNIZATION

• OTA authority usage up 18% FY26 vs FY25 per new DOD dashboard. Middle-tier acquisition (MTA) pathways now account for 34% of new starts.

• Test Resource Management Center (TRMC) releases updated range modernization roadmap. Priority investments: hypersonic test corridors at White Sands and Pacific Missile Range Facility; cyber-physical integration at Edwards; spectrum-sharing pilots at Nellis.

• DIU announces second tranche of Commercial Solutions Openings (CSO) for AI-enabled mission planning — $45M ceiling, 18-month base + 2 options. Proposals due 15 Oct.

• GAO report (GAO-26-106789) flags schedule risk on three major MTA programs; recommends milestone documentation improvements before Milestone B equivalents.

• Upcoming: ASN(RD&A) industry day 14 Oct on maritime autonomous systems OTA. Registration closes 7 Oct.

---
Acquisition Today Daily Briefing

Unsubscribe | Preferences

ACQUISITION TODAY — AFTERNOON UPDATE
2 October 2026

OTA ACTIVITY & BUDGET MARKS

• Senate Appropriations Committee (SAC) mark on FY27 NDAA: +$1.2B for rapid prototyping fund, -$300M from legacy sustainment lines. House mark expected next week.

• New OTA awards this week:
  - AFWERX: $87M for autonomous collaborative platforms (Phase 2)
  - SOFWERX: $22M for maritime domain awareness sensors
  - Army xTech: $15M for contested logistics AI

• Section 804 MTA pilot: 12 programs now in execution. Average time from requirement to contract: 11 months. DOD Comptroller to brief Congress 16 Oct on cost-growth metrics.

• Budget note: Continuing Resolution (CR) likely through 20 Dec per leadership aides. OTA obligations unaffected but new-start MTA approvals may pause.

• Reminder: AT&L workforce certification deadline 31 Oct. DAU virtual courses available through ALMS.

---
